summary: Implemented fulfillment→shipping status propagation: propagateOrderFulfillmentStatus checks all order lines are covered by shipped/delivered shipments, propagateOrderDeliveredStatus checks all non-voided shipments are delivered, tryAutoCompleteOrder transitions order to completed when both conditions met. Modified handleTrackingUpdate to use aggregate delivered check and auto-complete. Added in_transit→delivered to shipping_status transitions. Integration tests cover single/multi-shipment, partial coverage, voided shipments, and full e2e flow.
